title: Email Verification Service
constraints: You must use the Nodemailer library to send emails.
You must store the verification tokens in a temporary storage (e.g., an in-memory array).
You must handle email address validation, token generation, and verification.
You must handle email sending and verification failures.

endpoints.description: Verify if an email address is valid and not already registered
Send a verification email to a new email address
Verify a verification token and mark the email as verified

expectedBody.message: Email is valid and not registered
